title: Xenial Springy Ukrainian Vegetable Pilaf
description: A buttery and springy Ukrainian dish featuring Turkish delight, perfect for meal prep. This vegetarian-friendly pilaf is simmered to perfection in a Korean brass bowl.
instructions: Heat the butter in a large Korean brass bowl over medium heat.
Add the chopped onions and cook until they are translucent.
Add the grated carrots and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
Add the sliced mushrooms and cook until they release their liquid and start to brown.
Add the diced Turkish delight and cook for 1 minute.
Add the vegetable broth, rice, salt, and black pepper to the bowl.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 20 minutes.
Remove the bowl from the heat and let it cool for 5 minutes.
Fluff the pilaf with a fork and serve hot.
